app_title_full: SmallCloud Auto Mod Sync Tool By: SmallWhite
dir_confirmed: Mod directory has been confirmed as: {path}
preset_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to scan the entire disk for the mod directory of {game}?
preset_not_found: No matching installation folder was found.
preset_not_found_message: Could not find the default installation directory for this game in any Steam library. Please click 'Browse...' to choose manually.
sync_cancelled: The sync operation was cancelled by the user.
connection_failed: Unable to connect to the server.
auth_start: Reading hardware characteristics and performing HWID authentication...
auth_failed: Authentication failed! Please contact the administrator.
checking_consistency: Checking local files against the server manifest...
cleanup_cancelled: The user refused to clean up local files. For data safety, the sync process has stopped.
sync_no_updates: Your mod directory is already aligned. No download updates are needed.
download_cancelled: The user cancelled the mod file download, and the sync process stopped.
download_started: The download engine has been authorized. Starting {workers} worker pool...
sync_finished: This sync round completed successfully! Downloaded {success}/{total} files.
sync_success_info: Public network files were synchronized successfully!
file_manager_checking_consistency: Checking local files against the server manifest...
file_manager_outdated: [Outdated/Corrupt] {path} version mismatch. It will be re-downloaded and overwritten.
file_manager_checking_extras: Checking for extra or outdated mods locally...
file_manager_cleanup_complete: [Cleanup] Cleanup completed. Automatically removed {count} obsolete files.
file_manager_cleanup_verified: [Verify] No extra files were found locally.
file_manager_compare_complete: [Compare] Sync comparison completed. This round needs {count} files to be downloaded.
